description:
The WorldOrbSaver Component handles when a user is saving a world to their inventory when saving a world in general.

See World for more info about worlds.

fields.Orb: The orb to save to the user's inventory.
fields.saveHereItem: The context menu item used to trigger "Save Here".
fields.saveToInventoryItem: The context menu item used to trigger "Save to Inventory".
fields.cancelItem: The context menu item used to trigger "Cancel"
fields.menu: The context menu that was opened to handle this item's menu.
fields.interactive: Whether this item is interactive or not.
fields.saving: Whether this item is currently saving to the user's inventory.

methods.OnSaveHere: Handles when the item is being "saved here".
methods.OnSaveToInventory: Handles when the item is being saved to inventory.
methods.OnCancel: Handles when the saving of this item is being canceled.

usage: See World for more info about worlds.
